model_status: Empirical runtime prototype. The browser attempts to fetch current World Bank API values, then computes transparent composite scores. Fallback CSV values are illustrative only.

data_sources.name: World Bank World Development Indicators
data_sources.role: digital, health, education, climate, protected-area, emissions, air-pollution indicators

warning: The index is exploratory. It should be treated as a public reasoning instrument, not a formal ranking of nations.
